subcodes.first_line: O ye two seekers after the Divine Countenance! With utmost joy do I call to mind those two radiant candles, and with complete yearning this letter [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دو مشتاق دیدار در نهایت سرور بیاد آن دو شمع پرنورم و بکمال اشتیاق نامه
subcodes.subjects: @progress and the continual ascent of material civilization, @importance of community building, @serving humanity; working for progress, betterment of the world, @love of God
